title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer cannot log in even after resetting the password.

title: Payment not reflected
description: Customer completed payment but it is not visible in the order history.

title: Website loading slowly
description: Customer reports the website loads very slowly on mobile devices.

title: Incorrect product delivered
description: Customer received the wrong product for their recent order.

title: Refund request for damaged item
description: Customer wants a refund because the product arrived damaged.

title: Unable to update profile
description: Customer cannot save changes after editing their profile.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer reports that order confirmation emails are not arriving.

title: App crashes during checkout
description: Mobile application crashes when the customer tries to place an order.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Customer cannot apply a promotional discount code at checkout.

title: Order tracking not updating
description: Customer cannot see the latest shipping status for their order.
